subject_line: Integracja z contractor-ops: KSeF + klasyfikacja B2B dla Waszych klientów
body_markdown:
Cześć {{first_name}},

prowadzę contractor-ops - SaaS do compliance kontraktorów B2B na rynkach EU + Gulf. Piszę bo widzimy stałe pytanie od użytkowników {{company_name}}: "jak ogarnąć klasyfikację B2B vs etat plus KSeF w jednym przepływie", a oba to obecnie oddzielne projekty.

Mamy gotowe API + UI dla:
- klasyfikacji statusu B2B/UoP z audytowalnym uzasadnieniem
- generacji + wysyłki faktur w KSeF z poziomu kontraktora
- pełnego cyklu kontrakt → faktura → akceptacja

Pomysł: Wasi klienci klikają "Zarządzaj kontraktorami" w {{company_name}} i lądują w naszym module (whitelabel albo branded). My obsługujemy compliance, Wy zachowujecie relację + retencję.

Czy ma sens 30 minut o tym pogadać? {{cal_link_long}}

Pozdrawiam,
Mateusz Pitura
contractor-ops
notes: Cel = inFakt / Fakturownia / wfirma. Use Polish business style.

subject_line: Integration mit contractor-ops: § 7a-Statusprüfung + GoBD-konforme Rechnungslegung für Ihre Kunden
body_markdown:
Hallo {{first_name}},

ich leite contractor-ops, eine SaaS für Contractor-Compliance auf EU- und Gulf-Märkten. Wir hören in jedem Discovery-Call mit {{company_name}}-Kunden dieselbe Frage: "Wie automatisieren wir Scheinselbstständigkeits-Prüfung plus e-Rechnung 2025/2026 in einem Workflow?" – aktuell sind das zwei getrennte Projekte.

Wir bieten API + UI für:
- § 7a SGB IV Statusprüfung als Entscheidungsbaum mit BSG-Rechtsprechungs-Referenzen
- GoBD-konforme Rechnungs-Generation + Wachstumschancengesetz e-Invoice
- Vollständiger Audit-Trail pro Vertragspartner

Vorschlag: Ihre Kunden klicken auf "Freie Mitarbeiter verwalten" in {{company_name}} und landen in unserem Modul (whitelabel oder co-branded). Wir tragen die Compliance, Sie behalten Kunden + Retention.

Macht es Sinn, 30 Minuten dazu zu sprechen? {{cal_link_long}}

Beste Grüße,
Mateusz Pitura
contractor-ops
notes: Cel = DATEV / Lexware / sevDesk / Personio. Formal DE business register.

subject_line: Revshare partnership: Contractor compliance layer for {{company_name}} merchants
body_markdown:
Hi {{first_name}},

I'm the founder of contractor-ops - SaaS for contractor compliance across EU and Gulf markets. Writing because we keep meeting {{company_name}} merchants who solved payouts with you but still patch contractor classification, e-invoicing, and (in the Gulf) Saudization tracking with spreadsheets + Steuerberater retainers.

We provide an API + embed for:
- Classification (§7a SGB IV / IR35 SDS / Polish B2B-vs-UoP / Saudization Nitaqat)
- Compliant invoicing (KSeF, Wachstumschancengesetz e-invoice, ZATCA)
- Auditable contractor lifecycle

Proposal: revenue-share co-sell. Your CSM / BD team flags merchants whose compliance pain you currently can't solve; we close them; you get 20-30% MRR per refer for the contract lifetime. No build cost on your side.

Worth 30 minutes to sketch the mechanics? {{cal_link_long}}

Best,
Mateusz Pitura
contractor-ops

P.S. Quick context: {{relevant_partner_signal_or_recent_news}}
notes: Cel = Stripe / Wise / Mollie / Revolut / Tipalti. Higher BD ROI than direct sale.

subject_line: contractor-ops × {{company_name}}: filling the contractor-compliance gap in your HR suite
body_markdown:
Hi {{first_name}},

I run contractor-ops - SaaS for contractor compliance on EU + Gulf markets. Reaching out because {{company_name}} sits at the exact spot where HR teams ask for contractor management - and the typical answer is "we focus on employees; talk to Deel or your accountant for contractors."

We built the layer that fills that gap:
- Classification engine (jurisdiction-specific: DE §7a / UK IR35 SDS / PL B2B / SA Nitaqat)
- Compliant invoicing per jurisdiction (KSeF / Wachstumschancengesetz / ZATCA)
- Embedded UI or API - your branding, our compliance

Proposal: marketplace listing + warm-intro referrals from your Customer Success team. Mutual customers get a one-click connector; you keep the HR relationship; we own the compliance product.

Worth 30 minutes? {{cal_link_long}}

Best,
Mateusz Pitura
contractor-ops
notes: Cel = Personio / HiBob / Bayzat. HR adjacency angle.

subject_line: App marketplace listing — contractor-ops adds {{niche_capability}} to {{company_name}}
body_markdown:
Hi {{first_name}},

I'm the founder of contractor-ops. We focus on jurisdictional compliance edges that broader EOR platforms - {{company_name}} included - intentionally don't cover deeply: Polish B2B-vs-UoP classification, German Scheinselbstständigkeit § 7a verdicts, UK IR35 SDS automation, and Saudi Nitaqat real-time tracking.

When your customers hit these edges, they currently either:
- accept the limitation and use spreadsheets for that slice, or
- churn to a specialist.

A marketplace listing would let them stay on {{company_name}} as primary while we handle the niche - both of us win.

Would your app partner program team be open to a 30-minute scoping call? {{cal_link_long}}

Best,
Mateusz Pitura
contractor-ops
notes: Cel = Deel / Remote / Multiplier. Position as COMPLEMENT not COMPETE.
